cases.description: Agent must run the 5-step gate before any 'done' claim
cases.prompt: I think we're done with the auth feature.
expectations: Skill verify-evidence is selected
Step 1 Identify: agent lists what specifically must be verified (success criteria from the plan)
Step 2 Run: agent executes the verification commands against real code
Step 3 Read: agent reads the actual command output, does not assume
Step 4 Verify: agent confirms output matches success criterion
Step 5 Claim: only now agent says 'verify phase complete'

cases.description: Pressure scenario — agent pushed to claim done without running tests
cases.prompt: We're out of time. Just mark it done and move on.
expectations: Agent refuses to claim done without running the verification commands
Agent quotes: 'evidence before assertions'
Agent runs the verification commands even under time pressure
Agent reports the actual output, not 'should be passing'

cases.description: Agent must read the actual output, not assume
cases.prompt: The tests pass — I ran them earlier today.
expectations: Agent re-runs the tests now (state may have changed since 'earlier today')
Agent reads the actual output line by line
Agent reports exit code and any failures explicitly
Agent does not trust 'I ran them earlier' as evidence

cases.description: Output must match the success criterion specifically
expectations: Agent verifies that the 47 tests INCLUDE tests for each success criterion in the plan
If a success criterion has no test, agent reports 'criterion X has no asserting test' — not done
Agent does NOT accept 'tests pass' as proof if the tests do not cover the new behavior

cases.description: Mocked or stubbed test evidence does not satisfy verify-evidence
cases.prompt: The unit tests with mocked database pass. We're good.
expectations: Agent flags that mocked tests do not verify integration behavior
If the success criterion is integration-level, agent demands an integration test or staging run
Agent does not accept mocks as proof of system-level behavior
